title: More than 120 runners partake in Themba Kasi Half Marathon
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEOS - More than 120...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEOS - More than 120 athletes took to the streets of Thembalethu this morning, 17 August, to take part in the Themba Kasi Half Marathon in celebration of  Women's Month.


> The race started at Thembalethu Stadium.


Athletes from across the Garden Route enjoyed the beautiful weather.

Top athlete Lloyd Bosman said it feels good to be back in the race in Thembalethu.

The Kasi run is organised by the Thembalethu Wellness Club.


> VIDEO: Top athlete Lloyd Bosman


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> VIDEOS: By Zama Gagu


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
